summary: Classified 5 open PR inventory items independently. No shared canonical was selected, no security-sensitive items were identified, and no close/merge/fix action is safe or allowed from this plan shard.

actions.reason: Useful maintainer-owned draft PR with focused implementation evidence; keep open for maintainer review rather than close or classify against an invented canonical.
Active contributor PR with supplied proof and unique memory-search scope; failing checks and compatibility risk mean it should remain open for maintainer/CI follow-up, not be closed.
Focused contributor PR for a distinct QMD memory-core behavior; no duplicate/superseding evidence is hydrated in this shard.
Maintainer-owned draft PR with focused plugin metadata scope; related in area to plugin robustness but not a duplicate or close candidate.
Focused contributor PR with unique LLM/session-affinity scope; no duplicate/superseding evidence is hydrated and merge is blocked by job policy.
